name: observability
description: Observability skill for monitoring system health, tracking resource usage, analyzing metrics, and suggesting alerting rules.
author: ObsAI Team

health_check_timeout.description: Timeout in seconds for health check operations

alert_threshold_cpu.description: CPU usage percentage to trigger alert suggestions

alert_threshold_memory.description: Memory usage percentage to trigger alert suggestions

actions.name: check_system_health
actions.description: Returns overall system health status including service connectivity (Postgres, Ollama, ChromaDB, Redis), internal metrics, and active alerts.

actions.name: get_resource_usage
actions.description: Returns current CPU, memory, and disk usage for the system. Uses lightweight /proc-based checks with graceful fallback.

actions.name: analyze_metrics
actions.description: Analyze collected internal metrics such as response latency, throughput, error rates, and learning effectiveness. Optionally filter by metric name.

metric_name.description: Optional specific metric name to analyze (e.g., 'response_latency', 'error_rate', 'throughput')

actions.name: suggest_alerts
actions.description: Suggest alerting rules based on current system state and best practices. Optionally scope to a specific service.

service.description: Optional service name to scope alert suggestions to (e.g., 'postgres', 'ollama', 'chromadb')
